title: Battle of Merson

|forces4= |casual1=All ground forces |casual2=Moderate |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|Die well.''"
"''Copy that.|[[Ronhar Kim]] and [[Dox]]|}} The '''Battle of Merson''' during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] consisted of [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] forces, led by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Ronhar Kim]], his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Tap-Nar-Pal]] and Captain [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]], being sent into battle on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Merson]]. ==The battle== [[File:Merson.jpg|thumb|left|200px|The battle rages on.]] [[Republic Intelligence/Legends|Republic Intelligence]] underestimated the forces on the planet by a factor of five, and were crushed. The [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]] had expected the attack due to information given by [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]] to Count [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]], warning that the Republic would be arriving shortly. As a consequence, the local [[Merson pirates/Legends|Merson pirate]] forces were augmented with CIS droids and material. Captain Pellaeon withdrew upon the arrival of additional [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|CIS]] forces and Master Ronhar Kim, his Padawan and their army perished on the planet below. Kim's Padawan attempted a strafing run to assist his master, only to be shot down by [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2 super battle droids]]. ==Aftermath== With the death of Jedi Master Kim, his plan for testing the members of the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] for high [[Midi-chlorian/Legends|midi-chlorian]] counts died with him. Thus, Chancellor Palpatine's secret identity as Darth Sidious continued to remain a secret. {{Battle-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Battle for the Republic]]'' *[[Republic 64|''Republic'' 64]] {{1st}} {{Flash}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Schlacht von Merson#legends |pl=Bitwa o Merson |deGA=1 }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Merson, battle of}} [[Category:Battles in the Inner Rim]] [[Category:Battles of the Clone Wars]]
